---
title: "Publications"
---

## Journal Articles

**2025**

Licia Bobzien, Roland Verwiebe, Fabian Kalleitner (2025). Visualizing Age-Specific Digital Platform Usage in Germany. *Socius*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1177/23780231251319360)

Fabian Kalleitner, Lukas Schlogl, Licia Bobzien (2025). How much for whom? Explaining preferences for welfare benefits to short-time workers and the unemployed. *Journal of European Social Policy*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1177/09589287241283707)

---

**2024**

Fabian Kalleitner, Licia Bobzien (2024). Taxed Fairly? How Differences in Perception Shape Attitudes towards Progressive Taxation. *European Sociological Review*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1093/esr/jcad060)

---

**2023**

Sandra Bohmann, Fabian Kalleitner (2023). Subjective Inequity Aversion: Unfair Inequality, Subjective Well-Being, and Preferences for Redistribution. *SocArXiv*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.31235/osf.io/g8arw)

Fabian Kalleitner, Sandra Bohmann (2023). The Inequity Z: Income Fairness Perceptions in Europe across the Income Distribution. *Socius: Sociological Research for a Dynamic World*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1177/23780231231167138)

---

**2022**

Fabian Kalleitner, David W Schiestl, Georg Heiler (2022). Varieties of Mobility Measures: Comparing Survey and Mobile Phone Data during the COVID-19 Pandemic. *Public Opinion Quarterly*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1093/poq/nfac042)

Fabian Kalleitner, Monika Mühlböck, Bernhard Kittel (2022). What's the Benefit of a Video? The Effect of Nonmaterial Incentives on Response Rate and Bias in Web Surveys. *Social Science Computer Review*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1177/0894439320918318)

Monika Mühlböck, Fabian Kalleitner, Nadia Steiber, Bernhard Kittel (2022). Scarring Dreams? Young People's Vocational Aspirations and Expectations During and After Unemployment. *Social Inclusion*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.17645/si.v10i2.5162)

---

**2021**

Bernhard Kittel, Fabian Kalleitner, David W. Schiestl (2021). Peers for the Fearless: Social Norms Facilitate Preventive Behaviour When Individuals Perceive Low COVID-19 Health Risks. *PLOS ONE*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0260171)

Monika Mühlböck, Fabian Kalleitner, Nadia Steiber, Bernhard Kittel (2021). Information, Reflection, and Successful Job Search: A Labor Market Policy Experiment. *Social Policy & Administration*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1111/spol.12754)

Bernhard Kittel, Sylvia Kritzinger, Hajo Boomgaarden, Barbara Prainsack, Jakob-Moritz Eberl, Fabian Kalleitner, et al. (2021). The Austrian Corona Panel Project: Monitoring Individual and Societal Dynamics amidst the COVID-19 Crisis. *European Political Science*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1057/s41304-020-00294-7)

Licia Bobzien, Fabian Kalleitner (2021). Attitudes towards European Financial Solidarity during the Covid-19 Pandemic: Evidence from a Net-Contributor Country. *European Societies*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1080/14616696.2020.1836669)

Nicolas Albacete, Pirmin Fessler, Fabian Kalleitner, Peter Lindner (2021). How Has COVID-19 Affected the Financial Situation of Households in Austria? *Monetary Policy & the Economy*.
[[PDF]](https://econpapers.repec.org/article/onboenbmp/y_3a2021_3ai_3aq4_2f20-q1_2f21_3ab_3a5.htm)

---

**2019**

Bernhard Kittel, Fabian Kalleitner, Panos Tsakloglou (2019). The Transmission of Work Centrality within the Family in a Cross-Regional Perspective. *The ANNALS of the American Academy of Political and Social Science*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1177/0002716219827515)

Fabian Kalleitner, Anna Fassl, Simone Tamara Feichter (2019). Zeugnisse Des Umbruchs Und Der Kontinuität: Staatswissenschaftliche Dissertationen Und Deren Beurteilungen 1938–1948. *Die Soziologie Und Der Nationalsozialismus in Österreich*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1515/9783839447338-010)

---

**2018**

Fabian Kalleitner, Bernhard Kittel (2018). Das Einkommensverständnis in Österreich. Wissen und Zustimmung zur progressiven Besteuerung. *Aktuelle Probleme der Finanzsoziologie: die Fragestellungen von Rudolf Goldscheid heute*.

---

## Book Chapters

Bernhard Kittel, Fabian Kalleitner (2020). Wirtschaft. In *Forschungs- und Anwendungsfelder der Soziologie*.

## Working Papers & Preprints

Fabian Kalleitner, David W. Schiestl, Georg Heiler (2021). Varieties of Mobility Measures: Comparing Survey and Mobile Phone Data during the COVID-19 Pandemic. *SocArXiv*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.31235/osf.io/r78fk)

Bernhard Kittel, Fabian Kalleitner, David W. Schiestl (2021). Avoiding a Public Health Dilemma: Social Norms and Trust Facilitate Preventive Behaviour If Individuals Perceive Low COVID-19 Health Risks. *SocArXiv*.
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.31235/osf.io/q9b23)
